title: antherotoma afzelii
intro: Antherotoma afzelii, also known as African fir or fir tree, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Melastomataceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. Its health benefits include the treatment of various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an insect repellent. Antherotoma afzelii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or poultice, and its bark and leaves are used in traditional medicine in various forms.
